allow: PowerShell($base = "c:\\Users\\SebasDev\\Desktop\\documentacion-girgit\\educativo-saas\\Logica del negocio"; $dirs = @\("01-vision-y-alcance","02-usuarios-roles-y-permisos","03-multi-tenancy","04-procesos-academicos","05-comunicacion","06-monetizacion-y-pagos","07-reglas-de-negocio","08-casos-de-uso","09-reportes-y-analitica","10-integraciones-externas","_plantillas"\); foreach \($d in $dirs\) { New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path \(Join-Path $base $d\) -Force | Out-Null }; Get-ChildItem $base | Select-Object Name)

PowerShell($base = "c:\\Users\\SebasDev\\Desktop\\documentacion-girgit\\educativo-saas\\Logica del negocio\\02-usuarios-roles-y-permisos\\roles"; $rename = @{ "superadministrador-plataforma.md" = "00-superadministrador-plataforma.md"; "rector-administrador-colegio.md" = "01-rector-administrador-colegio.md"; "coordinador-academico.md" = "02-coordinador-academico.md"; "coordinador-convivencia.md" = "03-coordinador-convivencia.md"; "coordinador-academico-y-convivencia.md" = "04-coordinador-academico-y-convivencia.md"; "secretaria-academica.md" = "05-secretaria-academica.md"; "docente.md" = "06-docente.md"; "director-de-grupo.md" = "07-director-de-grupo.md"; "estudiante-y-acudiente.md" = "08-estudiante-y-acudiente.md" }; foreach \($k in $rename.Keys\) { Rename-Item -Path \(Join-Path $base $k\) -NewName $rename[$k] }; Get-ChildItem $base -File | Sort-Object Name | Select-Object -ExpandProperty Name)
